description: Schema the AI is asked to fill in for the Transactions Summary page. Edit cautiously — the UI renders against this shape.

political_pulse.congressional_focus: What Congress is debating that may move markets
political_pulse.policy_impact: Net read on how policy will affect held positions

today_summary.narrative: Plain-English account of what happened in trading today from market open to now.

data_pulled_and_filtered.filter_notes: Why some candidates were dropped (e.g., daily cap, already held, low conviction).
